hypothesis: Integrating a dedicated molecular-image localization and segmentation module into the single-agent preprocessing pipeline and routing segmented molecule images to DECIMER for structure-to-SMILES conversion will increase SMILES extraction recall on the ChemX small-molecule datasets from approximately 0.03–0.04 to at least 0.50 and produce an absolute increase of at least 0.30 in overall small-molecule extraction F1.
